overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person drive through a dense urban canyon with tall concrete apartment buildings. The camera passes a red sedan early on and continues along a multi-lane street under clear morning skies, eventually passing a large beige residential complex on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon street with green rocky shoulder

events.description: red sedan driving in opposite direction passes by on the left side of the road
green rocky terrain on right transitions to building facade as the street becomes more enclosed

agents.ego_description: driving forward through the urban canyon, maintaining steady speed along the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: red sedan traveling in opposite direction passes the camera at moderate speed

entered.detail: tall brown apartment towers with multiple balconies and weathered concrete facades
steep green hillside with rocky outcrops and sparse vegetation bordering the street
tall modern glass and steel building visible at the end of the street canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins a drive through a dense urban canyon with tall concrete towers on the left and a green rocky hillside on the right. A red sedan passes in the opposite direction around 11 seconds, and the green terrain gradually gives way to building facades as the street becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with high-rise residential buildings

events.description: large beige apartment building becomes prominent on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the urban canyon, approaching the large beige building complex on the right

entered.detail: large multi-story beige residential building with grid-patterned windows and flat roof

segments.scene_description: Driving through a fully enclosed urban canyon with concrete towers on both sides. The green terrain has been replaced by buildings, and a large beige apartment complex becomes increasingly prominent on the right as the camera approaches it.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street curving past large residential complex

events.description: slight right turn as the camera drives alongside and begins to pass the beige apartment building

agents.ego_description: driving past the large beige building on the right, following the gentle right curve of the road

entered.detail: additional high-rise apartment building continuing the urban canyon wall on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera drives alongside the large beige apartment building, which dominates the right side of the frame before gradually receding. The road curves slightly to the right, revealing more of the continuous urban canyon with additional concrete towers ahead on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through an urban canyon that shifts from a semi-open roadside into a densely enclosed corridor of concrete towers. It begins with tall buildings on the left and a green rocky hillside on the right, passing a red sedan moving in the opposite direction as the natural terrain gradually gives way to building facades. As the street becomes more enclosed, the camera enters a fully walled urban canyon where concrete towers flank both sides and a large beige apartment complex becomes increasingly prominent on the right. The scene then shifts to drive directly alongside this massive beige building, which dominates the frame before the road curves slightly to the right. Finally, the apartment complex recedes, revealing a continuing stretch of the urban canyon with additional concrete towers looming ahead on the left.
